name: Redis Single Node to Cluster Migration
description: Migrate from a single Redis instance to a Redis Cluster for improved scalability and high availability

template.description: We are migrating our Redis infrastructure from a single {{currentNodes}}-node setup to a {{targetNodes}}-node Redis Cluster. Current data size is {{dataSize}}GB with {{trafficQPS}} queries per second. The migration will involve resharding data across cluster nodes and updating application connection logic to use cluster-aware clients.
template.currentState: Single Redis instance ({{currentNodes}} node) handling {{trafficQPS}} QPS with {{dataSize}}GB of data. Applications use standard Redis clients with direct connection strings.
template.proposedState: Redis Cluster with {{targetNodes}} nodes (3 masters, 3 replicas) with automatic sharding. Applications updated to use cluster-aware Redis clients with cluster endpoint discovery.
template.trafficPatterns: Peak traffic: {{trafficQPS}} QPS. Mix of read-heavy (70%) and write operations (30%). Critical operations include session management, caching, and real-time counters.
